gold.rationale: 现有可核对的可靠信息只支持“乐山公交车身广告语引发争议、且后半句在流传画面中被遮挡”这一点；样本文本进一步把其上升为“公益宣传/部门牵头、校园周边与多线路高频投放、已紧急叫停撤下”等结论，但缺少可核验的官方来源支撑，且配图中存在明显编辑与图文语义/证据力度不匹配，导致整体叙事以误导为主。

atoms: Blue bus side panel with white text advertising slogans.
Text reads: '儿女是祖先的遗德' (Children are the legacy of ancestors).
Text reads: '堕胎是断祖先血脉' (Abortion is cutting off ancestors' bloodline).
Text reads: '是不孕不育的源头' (Is the source of infertility).
Text reads: '是万事不顺的根源' (Is the root of all misfortune).
Text reads: '贞洁，是女孩最高贵的嫁妆' (Chastity is the most noble dowry for a girl).
Text reads: '贞洁，是...高贵的聘礼' (Chastity is... a noble betrothal gift, partially obscured).
Yellow text overlay at top: '四川乐山一公交车' (A bus in Leshan, Sichuan).
Yellow text overlay: '车身广告语引争议' (Body copy advertising language causes controversy).
Yellow text overlay: '交通运输局：表述不妥' (Transportation Bureau: Expression is inappropriate).
Yellow text overlay: '已要求整改拆除' (Has required rectification and removal).
Small circular sticker on the bus: '公益宣传 文明城市创建' (Public welfare promotion, civilized city creation).
Watermark at bottom: '@4A广告网' (@4A Advertising Network).
Bus wheel and side vent visible.
Blue bus side panel with white text advertising slogans.
Text reads: '早恋是险道，耗精伤神易早衰' (Early love is a dangerous path, consuming essence damages spirit, easy to early aging).
Text reads: '同居是陷阱，血本无归的付出' (Cohabitation is a trap, a loss of all investment).
Text reads: '堕胎是深渊，折福折寿厄运缠' (Abortion is an abyss, bringing bad luck and shortening life).
Yellow text overlay at bottom: '记者从乐山市井研县' (Reporter learned from Jingyan County, Leshan City).
Yellow text overlay: '交通运输局获悉，该广告语' (Transportation Bureau learned, this advertising copy).
Yellow text overlay: '系一家奶粉企业投放' (Was placed by a milk powder enterprise).
Yellow text overlay: '只在一辆公交车上喷印' (Only sprayed on one bus).
Blue background with some reflection or smudge.
White rectangular sign with black text.
Text reads: '根据《广告法》第九条第七项规定' (According to Article 9, Item 7 of the Advertising Law).
Text reads: '广告不得妨碍社会公共秩序或者违背社会良好风尚' (Ads shall not hinder public order or violate good social customs).
Text reads: '将贞洁直接定性为最高贵的嫁妆、聘礼' (Defining chastity directly as the most noble dowry and betrothal gift).
Text reads: '将女性的价值与贞洁绑定' (Binding women's value to chastity).
Text reads: '将男性价值与聘礼绑定' (Binding men's value to betrothal gifts).
Text reads: '涉嫌物化性别、宣扬落后的婚恋观' (Suspected of objectifying gender, promoting backward marriage views).
Small circular sticker on the right: '公益宣传 文明城市创建' (Public welfare promotion, civilized city creation).
Red taillight visible on the left edge.
Nighttime street scene with illuminated streetlights.
Pink double-decker open-top bus in the foreground with passengers on the upper deck.
Text on the pink bus: '乐山' (Leshan) in large characters.
Text on the pink bus: 'A CITY WITH A HISTORY OF 2,000 YEARS'.
Green and yellow bus in the background on the left.
Traffic lights and buildings in the distance.
Trees lining the street.
Watermark at bottom right: '中新网 四川新闻网' (China News Service Sichuan News Network).
Pink balloons visible on the bus roof.
Screenshot of a WeChat group chat titled '乐山同城交流群 (150)' (Leshan Local Exchange Group).
User 'A市民' posts a message about seeing a bus ad saying '贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼' (Chastity is the most noble betrothal gift for boys).
User '小李' asks if the ad is real and what era this view belongs to.
User '路人甲' mentions the ad was notified to be removed.
User '乐山本地通' confirms the Transportation Bureau will remove the ads today.
User '一位年轻妈妈' expresses concern about children seeing the ad.
User '大家来聊聊' comments that the view is too old-fashioned.
Timestamps visible: '15:42', '2026年3月' (March 2026).
Blue '发送' (Send) buttons at the bottom.
Teal/Green bus parked on a street.
Bus number 'M032 992' visible on the rear.
Large advertisement on the rear door featuring cartoon characters and a milk carton.
Text on the side of the bus: '美食家' (Foodie).
People standing near the bus door on the right.
Trees and a white car in the background.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A close-up of a blue bus side panel displaying controversial white text about chastity, infertility, and abortion. Overlays in yellow and white text describe the controversy and the Transportation Bureau's response. A small 'Public Welfare' sticker is visible on the bus.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 四川乐山一公交车 车身广告语引争议 交通运输局：表述不妥 已要求整改拆除 儿女是祖先的遗德 堕胎是断祖先血脉 是不孕不育的源头 是万事不顺的根源 贞洁，是女孩最高贵的嫁妆 贞洁，是...高贵的聘礼 @4A广告网 公益宣传 文明城市创建

Yellow text overlay: '已要求整改拆除'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows the bus body copy mentioned in the overlay text, confirming the location and content of the controversy.

visual_indicators.scene_description: Another section of the blue bus with different white text warnings about early love, cohabitation, and abortion. A yellow text overlay at the bottom explains the source of the ad (a milk powder company) and that it was only on one bus.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 早恋是险道，耗精伤神易早衰 同居是陷阱，血本无归的付出 堕胎是深渊，折福折寿厄运缠 记者从乐山市井研县 交通运输局获悉，该广告语 系一家奶粉企业投放 只在一辆公交车上喷印
visible_overlays_annotations: Yellow text overlay: '记者从乐山市井研县'
Yellow text overlay: '交通运输局获悉，该广告语'
Yellow text overlay: '系一家奶粉企业投放'
Yellow text overlay: '只在一辆公交车上喷印'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides the specific text content mentioned in the overlay, confirming the ad's message and the reporter's source.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A white sign explaining the legal basis for the controversy, citing the Advertising Law and criticizing the ad for objectifying gender and promoting backward views. A 'Public Welfare' sticker is present.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 根据《广告法》第九条第七项规定，广告不得妨碍社会公共秩序或者违背社会良好风尚。将贞洁直接定性为最高贵的嫁妆、聘礼，将女性的价值与贞洁绑定，将男性价值与聘礼绑定，涉嫌物化性别、宣扬落后的婚恋观。 公益宣传 文明城市创建
visible_overlays_annotations: Sticker: '公益宣传 文明城市创建'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image displays the legal reasoning and criticism mentioned in the post text regarding the ad's content.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A night shot of a pink double-decker bus with tourists on top, driving down a city street. The bus has 'Leshan' branding.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 乐山 A CITY WITH A HISTORY OF 2,000 YEARS 中新网 四川新闻网
visible_overlays_annotations: Watermark: '中新网 四川新闻网'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows a decorated bus in Leshan, consistent with the location mentioned in the post, though it is a different bus than the one with the controversial ad.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a WeChat group chat discussing the bus ad controversy. Users express shock, ask about the source, and confirm the Transportation Bureau's response.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 乐山同城交流群 (150) A市民 我今天在街上居然看到乐山公交车身有广告，写着“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”。真是活久见啊！ 小李 我也听说了，这广告是真的吗？什么年代了还有这种观念？ 路人甲 听说已经通知撤下了。就在刚刚，好像引起的争议太大。 乐山本地通 是的，相关部门反应很快，说是今天下午就会把这一批广告全部处理完。 一位年轻妈妈 我更担心这个广告被小孩子看到。他们如果不懂，会不会产生错误的价值观？家里有娃的真的会担忧。 大家来聊聊 就是啊，这种观念太陈旧了，放在公交车上广而告之真的不合适，对社会风气不好。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows the exact conversation flow described in the post text, including the specific quote '贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A teal bus parked on a street with a commercial advertisement for a milk product on the rear door. People are boarding the bus.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows a different bus with a different ad, serving as a visual contrast or context for the bus environment mentioned in the post.

image_2 is offered as supplementary evidence showing related text about '堕胎' and '早恋' on the same bus.
image_3 is used to illustrate the 'public welfare' label ('公益宣传') mentioned in the text.
image_4 is presented as a screenshot of the official response from the Transportation Bureau regarding the ad.
image_5 is used to visually contrast the controversial ad with a standard commercial bus advertisement.
image_6 is used to illustrate the 'multiple lines' claim mentioned in the text.

retrieved_evidence.text: #四川乐山一公交车车身广告语引争议# 起争议的广告语后半句，“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”被部分遮挡。 ​​​
四川乐山近期一则公交车身公益广告引发广泛争议，广告语“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”被指由当地有关部门以“政府倡导贞洁教育”名义推出。据相关人员介绍，该广告张贴在城区运行的公交车侧面，车辆行驶在主干道和居民区之间时，车身大片区域被用于呈现这句口号，部分文字在行驶和遮挡情况下仍可辨认，成为市民议论焦点，随后被官方紧急叫停。
据相关媒体梳理，四川乐山市此前在创建全国文明城市过程中，曾多次通过公交车身、站台灯箱和社区公告栏发布公益广告，主题涵盖环境保护、文明出行、家庭和睦等内容。与以往较为中性的宣传相比，本次“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”口号被批评缺乏对现代家庭结构和年轻人价值观的敏感度，暴露出审批环节对性别和婚恋议题把关不严的问题，也引发其他城市对类似宣传项目进行自查。
近日，四川乐山市一则张贴在当地公交车车身上的公益广告画面在网络上引发关注。据当地居民和乘客介绍，该广告被安装在市区运行的多辆公交车辆外侧，画面背景配以人物剪影和文字标语。由于广告内容涉及家庭观念等较为敏感的话题，相关画面在被拍摄并上传网络后迅速在多家社交平台转发，乐山公共交通领域的户外广告设置情况也随之受到舆论进一步审视，相关部门尚未就此做出详细说明。
据社交平台本周多条讨论内容显示，围绕四川乐山一处公交车身广告语的争议，主要集中在文案后半部分“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”这一表述上。多名网友在转发相关画面时表示，这一语句被认为可能涉及对性别角色的固化理解，引发不同立场的解读和评论。有评论人士指出，类似针对青少年价值观的宣传语在公开空间使用时应更加审慎，相关广告是否经过充分论证目前尚无权威部门作出具体回应。
围绕乐山公交车身广告的争议集中在具体文案措辞上，特别是“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”这句口号被完整呈现时，引发了关于性别观念与教育价值取向的激烈讨论。根据社交平台上流传的描述，该公益宣传的品牌标识和署名信息并不显眼，远不如文案本身醒目，许多市民在注意到这句口号后，对其是否适合作为公共交通工具外侧的宣传内容提出质疑，认为可能对青少年产生不当导向。
据乐山当地网民与自媒体的说法，这则被官方证实为“政府倡导贞洁教育”的公交车身公益广告一度被视作城市文明建设内容的一部分，有关设计中还附加了类似“文明城市创建·公益宣传”的标识，用以表明宣传性质。观察人士指出，这类标识通常出现在广告角落，用于说明由政府或相关机构主办，但在此次事件中，文案所传递的性别角色期待引发共鸣不佳，反而促使更多市民从“是否代表官方价值立场”的角度提出批评。
乐山市区公交线路密集，穿行于学校周边、商业区和居民社区，公共交通工具外部的公益宣传长期被视作城市文明传播的重要载体。近日有报道提到，在围绕“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”公交广告的争议中，不少家长关注该类内容在学生通勤线路上频繁出现的可能性，担心未成年人在日常通行过程中受到片面价值观影响。交通与教育部门因此被呼吁加强对车身公益广告内容的审核和规范，避免类似口号再度引发全城抵制。
据多名网友近日在社交平台上传的图片显示，关于乐山公交车身争议广告的流传画面中，广告语后半句存在部分被遮挡的情况。图片中可见，车身门框、扶手或其他结构遮住了文字的一截，使完整句子在某些角度下难以一眼辨识。参与讨论的网民称，这一视觉特征可能影响外界对广告语原貌的理解，也给后续解读带来一定偏差。当地相关单位目前尚未公布该广告完整设计稿及安装位置的详细信息。
乐山官方在被媒体问及此事时表示，已对相关公交车身广告进行全面清理和整改，并强调将完善审批流程，防止类似引发争议的文案再次出现在公共领域。据当地消息人士透露，后续城市公益广告将更注重倡导尊重、平等与责任等基础价值，以回应市民在本次事件中提出的关切。各界普遍期待，在社会民生议题日益多元的背景下，公共传播能够在尊重传统的同时，更好体现现代法治和性别平等原则。
广告业内人士近日向记者介绍，关于乐山公交车身争议广告的图片，最早系由某广告行业账号在社交平台发布，引发关注后被大量转发。据称，该账号上传的是一张公交车侧面局部照片，随后“来自社交平台的截图和图片”在不同平台持续传播，成为相关讨论的重要依据。多名网友表示，他们接触到的信息主要来自这一传播链条中的转发截图，目前尚不清楚原始拍摄者身份及图片拍摄时间，相关细节仍待进一步披露。
事件发酵后，乐山不少学校家长群和社区聊天群成为信息传播的重要渠道，群内成员互相转发有关公交车身广告的描述，并称“已经被要求撤下”“教育部门牵头处理”等消息，引发家长对处理进展的持续关注。根据群聊信息整理，一些家长表示先前已经在街头看到有关“贞洁教育”的公益宣传，对其是否适宜出现在公共空间提出反思，同时期待官方通过更透明的说明，阐明政策初衷与后续整改措施。
围绕这则乐山公交车身争议广告，一些女性权益组织和社会学研究者通过公开评论指出，将“贞洁”与“男孩”“聘礼”等词汇直接相连，容易巩固陈旧的性别刻板印象，并对男女双方在婚恋关系中的地位造成不平等期待。讨论中还提到，公共交通空间具有高度开放性和强曝光度，公益宣传一旦触及敏感议题，便应更加注意用语的包容性和普适性，以免在社会民生层面引发不必要的对立或误解。
在讨论乐山公交车身广告的过程中，性教育与价值观引导在公共政策中的角色成为舆论焦点之一。教育领域专家指出，近年来全国多地在推进未成年人保护和健康教育时，强调科学性与尊重个体差异，反对以单一标准衡量“贞洁”或将其与婚恋、聘礼等传统观念简单绑定。此次乐山事件被视为公共宣传用语与当代性别平等观念冲突的典型案例，促使地方政府重新审视公益宣传审批流程。
在地方治理层面，乐山公交车身广告事件也被纳入对公共话语权配置的反思之中。城市管理部门被舆论要求明确政府倡导内容的边界，尤其是在涉及青少年教育、家庭伦理与性别文化时，应广泛听取教师、家长和专家意见。部分评论认为，此次因“贞洁教育”引起的全城抵制，暴露了传统道德话语与现代公民权利意识之间的张力，为未来制定更合理的公益宣传导则提供了现实案例。

atom_queries: image_1 is presented as visual evidence of the controversial bus ad text '贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼' in Leshan.
image_2 is offered as supplementary evidence showing related text about '堕胎' and '早恋' on the same bus.
image_3 is used to illustrate the 'public welfare' label ('公益宣传') mentioned in the text.
image_4 is presented as a screenshot of the official response from the Transportation Bureau regarding the ad.
image_5 is used to visually contrast the controversial ad with a standard commercial bus advertisement.
image_6 is used to illustrate the 'multiple lines' claim mentioned in the text.
Blue bus side panel with white text advertising slogans.
Text reads: '儿女是祖先的遗德' (Children are the legacy of ancestors).
Text reads: '堕胎是断祖先血脉' (Abortion is cutting off ancestors' bloodline).
Text reads: '是不孕不育的源头' (Is the source of infertility).
Text reads: '是万事不顺的根源' (Is the root of all misfortune).
Text reads: '贞洁，是女孩最高贵的嫁妆' (Chastity is the most noble dowry for a girl).
Text reads: '贞洁，是...高贵的聘礼' (Chastity is... a noble betrothal gift, partially obscured).
Yellow text overlay at top: '四川乐山一公交车' (A bus in Leshan, Sichuan).
Yellow text overlay: '车身广告语引争议' (Body copy advertising language causes controversy).
Yellow text overlay: '交通运输局：表述不妥' (Transportation Bureau: Expression is inappropriate).
Yellow text overlay: '已要求整改拆除' (Has required rectification and removal).
Small circular sticker on the bus: '公益宣传 文明城市创建' (Public welfare promotion, civilized city creation).
Watermark at bottom: '@4A广告网' (@4A Advertising Network).
Bus wheel and side vent visible.
Text reads: '早恋是险道，耗精伤神易早衰' (Early love is a dangerous path, consuming essence damages spirit, easy to early aging).
Text reads: '同居是陷阱，血本无归的付出' (Cohabitation is a trap, a loss of all investment).
Text reads: '堕胎是深渊，折福折寿厄运缠' (Abortion is an abyss, bringing bad luck and shortening life).
Yellow text overlay at bottom: '记者从乐山市井研县' (Reporter learned from Jingyan County, Leshan City).
Yellow text overlay: '交通运输局获悉，该广告语' (Transportation Bureau learned, this advertising copy).
Yellow text overlay: '系一家奶粉企业投放' (Was placed by a milk powder enterprise).
Yellow text overlay: '只在一辆公交车上喷印' (Only sprayed on one bus).
Blue background with some reflection or smudge.
White rectangular sign with black text.
Text reads: '根据《广告法》第九条第七项规定' (According to Article 9, Item 7 of the Advertising Law).
Text reads: '广告不得妨碍社会公共秩序或者违背社会良好风尚' (Ads shall not hinder public order or violate good social customs).
Text reads: '将贞洁直接定性为最高贵的嫁妆、聘礼' (Defining chastity directly as the most noble dowry and betrothal gift).
Text reads: '将女性的价值与贞洁绑定' (Binding women's value to chastity).
Text reads: '将男性价值与聘礼绑定' (Binding men's value to betrothal gifts).
Text reads: '涉嫌物化性别、宣扬落后的婚恋观' (Suspected of objectifying gender, promoting backward marriage views).
Small circular sticker on the right: '公益宣传 文明城市创建' (Public welfare promotion, civilized city creation).
Red taillight visible on the left edge.
Nighttime street scene with illuminated streetlights.
Pink double-decker open-top bus in the foreground with passengers on the upper deck.
Text on the pink bus: '乐山' (Leshan) in large characters.
Text on the pink bus: 'A CITY WITH A HISTORY OF 2,000 YEARS'.
Green and yellow bus in the background on the left.
Traffic lights and buildings in the distance.
Trees lining the street.
Watermark at bottom right: '中新网 四川新闻网' (China News Service Sichuan News Network).
Pink balloons visible on the bus roof.
Screenshot of a WeChat group chat titled '乐山同城交流群 (150)' (Leshan Local Exchange Group).
User 'A市民' posts a message about seeing a bus ad saying '贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼' (Chastity is the most noble betrothal gift for boys).
User '小李' asks if the ad is real and what era this view belongs to.
User '路人甲' mentions the ad was notified to be removed.
User '乐山本地通' confirms the Transportation Bureau will remove the ads today.
User '一位年轻妈妈' expresses concern about children seeing the ad.
User '大家来聊聊' comments that the view is too old-fashioned.
Timestamps visible: '15:42', '2026年3月' (March 2026).
Blue '发送' (Send) buttons at the bottom.
Teal/Green bus parked on a street.
Bus number 'M032 992' visible on the rear.
Large advertisement on the rear door featuring cartoon characters and a milk carton.
Text on the side of the bus: '美食家' (Foodie).
People standing near the bus door on the right.
Trees and a white car in the background.

A screenshot of a WeChat group chat discussing the bus ad controversy. Users express shock, ask about the source, and confirm the Transportation Bureau's response.

乐山同城交流群 (150) A市民 我今天在街上居然看到乐山公交车身有广告，写着“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”。真是活久见啊！ 小李 我也听说了，这广告是真的吗？什么年代了还有这种观念？ 路人甲 听说已经通知撤下了。就在刚刚，好像引起的争议太大。 乐山本地通 是的，相关部门反应很快，说是今天下午就会把这一批广告全部处理完。 一位年轻妈妈 我更担心这个广告被小孩子看到。他们如果不懂，会不会产生错误的价值观？家里有娃的真的会担忧。 大家来聊聊 就是啊，这种观念太陈旧了，放在公交车上广而告之真的不合适，对社会风气不好。
WeChat
Leshan Local Exchange Group
A teal bus parked on a street with a commercial advertisement for a milk product on the rear door. People are boarding the bus.
M032 992 美食家
Bus
Milk Product Ad

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately identifies the core event and text but significantly overstates the scope of the campaign and the official response compared to the evidence.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: The post claims the ad is a 'public welfare project' led by relevant departments and installed on 'multiple lines' in the 'main urban area' (evidence [2], [3], [4] state it was installed on 'several' vehicles, the source was a 'milk powder enterprise', and the Transportation Bureau has not confirmed a multi-line official campaign or specific deployment details).
t2_problematic_subclaims: Claim that the ad is a 'public welfare project' led by relevant departments (evidence shows it was a milk powder enterprise ad).
Claim that the ad is installed on 'multiple lines' in the 'main urban area' (evidence states it was on 'several' vehicles and details are undisclosed).

Claim that the Transportation Bureau has confirmed the ad is being removed (evidence [1] and [4] show the Bureau stated the expression was inappropriate and required rectification/removal, but the post frames this as a definitive 'emergency stop' of a confirmed public welfare campaign without citing the specific 'public welfare' confirmation from the Bureau).
Claim that the ad is a 'public welfare project' (evidence [2] and [5] indicate it was a commercial ad by a milk powder company).
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post accurately describes the controversy and the specific text but fabricates the nature of the campaign as an official public welfare initiative and exaggerates the scale of deployment beyond what the evidence confirms.

images.explanation: The image shows the specific bus ad text mentioned in the post and evidence, including the controversial phrase '贞洁...高贵的聘礼' and the '公益宣传' label context.

images.v2_evidence: Image shows a pink double-decker bus and other commercial buses, not the blue bus with the controversial ad.
images.c_evidence: The post claims this image illustrates 'multiple lines' of the controversial ad, but the image shows a completely different bus type and scene.
images.explanation: The image depicts a general city street scene with buses, but it does not show the specific blue bus or the controversial ad text mentioned in the post context.

images.scene_description: A screenshot of a WeChat group chat titled '乐山城交流群' discussing the bus ad.
images.ocr_text: 乐山同城交流群 (150) A市民 我今天在街上居然看到乐山公交车身有广告，写着“贞洁是男孩最高贵的聘礼”。真是活久见啊！ [转发了一条模糊的照片] 小李 我也听说了，这广告是认真的吗？什么年代了还有这种观念？ 路人甲 听说已经通知撤下了。就在刚刚，好像引起的争议太大。 乐山本地通 是的，相关部门反应很快，说是今天下午就会把这一批广告全部处理完。 一位年轻妈妈 我更担心这个广告被小孩子看到。他们如果不懂，会不会产生错误的价值观？家里有娃的真的会担忧。 大家来聊聊 就是啊，这种观念太陈旧了，放在公交车上广而告之真的不合适，对社会风气不好。
images.explanation: The image is a screenshot of the WeChat group chat mentioned in the post, showing the discussion about the ad and the removal notice.

images.scene_description: A daytime shot of a teal/green bus with a colorful cartoon-style advertisement on the side.
images.explanation: The image shows a standard commercial bus ad, which the post uses to contrast with the controversial ad.

judge.level3_rationale: 该广告实为一家奶粉企业的商业投放，而非政府部门主导的公益宣传，且仅在部分车辆上出现，并非全城多条线路的广泛铺开，文章将商业行为误读为官方公益项目，严重误导了公众对事件性质的理解。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post's core claim about the ad's content and the Bureau's response is true, but the framing of the ad as a government 'public welfare' project is false based on evidence identifying it as a commercial ad. This creates a misleading narrative about the nature of the controversy.
judge.core_claim: A controversial bus ad in Leshan, Sichuan, featuring the slogan 'Chastity is the most noble betrothal gift for boys', was identified as a public welfare campaign by the Transportation Bureau and has been ordered for removal.
key_subclaims: The ad slogan is 'Chastity is the most noble betrothal gift for boys'.
The ad was placed by a milk powder enterprise.
The ad was installed on multiple bus lines in the main urban area.
The Transportation Bureau confirmed the ad was inappropriate and ordered its removal.
The ad was presented as a 'public welfare' campaign by the Transportation Bureau.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The ad slogan is 'Chastity is the most noble betrothal gift for boys'.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by text in post and images 1, 2, 5.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The ad was placed by a milk powder enterprise.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by text overlay in image 2 and news snippet [2].

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The ad was installed on multiple bus lines in the main urban area.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence states it was on 'several' vehicles, but the post exaggerates this to 'multiple lines' and 'main urban area' as a systematic campaign.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The Transportation Bureau confirmed the ad was inappropriate and ordered its removal.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by text overlay in image 1 and news snippet [2].

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The ad was presented as a 'public welfare' campaign by the Transportation Bureau.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [2] explicitly states it was placed by a 'milk powder enterprise', contradicting the claim that the Transportation Bureau presented it as a public welfare project.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post accurately reports the core event and the Transportation Bureau's response but significantly distorts the context by claiming the ad was a 'public welfare project' led by the government, whereas evidence confirms it was a commercial milk powder ad. The post also exaggerates the scope of the campaign. These distortions create a misleading impression of the event's nature and origin.

image_findings.explanation: Image shows the bus ad text and overlays confirming the Transportation Bureau's response, aligning with the post's visual evidence.
Image shows the specific text about early love and abortion, and the overlay clarifies it was a milk powder enterprise ad, correcting the post's implication of a government campaign.
Image displays the legal reasoning and the 'Public Welfare' sticker, which the post uses to frame the ad as a government project.
Image shows a pink double-decker bus in a different context (tourism/promotion) unrelated to the controversial ad.
Image shows the WeChat group chat discussing the ad, confirming the public reaction described in the post.
Image shows a different bus with a commercial milk ad, unrelated to the specific controversial ad text.
